title: East Anglia One North and East Anglia Two Offshore Windfarms Kittiwake, lesser black-backed gull and red-throated diver compensation measures: post-consent condition compliance, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State as to whether a signed guarantee between East Anglia One North Limited and East Anglia Two Limited (the undertakers) and ScottishPower Renewables (UK) Limited (the guarantor) and the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (the Secretary of State), provided suitable form of security to cover the Kittiwake compensation measures, lesser black-backed gull compensation measures, and red-throated diver compensation measures as stated in the East Anglia One North Offshore Wind Farm Order 2022 and East Anglia Two Order Offshore Wind Farm Order 2022.  Date of decision  25 July 2025  Company/location   ScottishPower RenewablesScottishPower House320 Vincent StGlasgowG2 5AD   Type of project  Post-consent condition compliance under the Planning Act 2008. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
